sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4158" key="a(li/bromos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλί-βρομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">murmuring like the sea</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:43:385" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.385</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
